title: swarm-do telemetry adjudication record v2
description: One row per human or judge-agent adjudication of a disagreement. v2 adds rubric_version and blind_batch_id as required fields for stratified sampling. v1 is frozen; v2 is the new default write path.

outcome_id.description: ULID of the parent outcomes.jsonl row

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the adjudication was recorded

rubric_version.description: Version identifier of the adjudication rubric used, pinned from swarm-do/rubrics/v*.md at sample generation time. Format: e.g. '1', '2', etc.

blind_batch_id.description: Identifier of the stratified sampling batch. Used to group adjudications from a single run of sample-for-adjudication.

rationale.description: Free-text rationale for the decision. null if not provided.

overridden_finding_ids.description: ULIDs of findings.jsonl rows overridden by this adjudication. null if none.

schema_ok.description: True = writer attests the row conforms to this schema.
